# Scrum Poker Cards

> Free, real-time planning poker for agile teams with illustrated cards.

## About

Scrum Poker Cards is a free, open-source web app for agile planning poker. Teams create a session, share a link, and estimate stories together in real-time — no signup required.

The app features beautifully illustrated cards originally designed by Redbooth, each with a fun idiom matching the effort level (e.g., "Piece of cake" for 2, "Here be dragons" for unknown).

## Features

- Real-time multiplayer sessions via WebSocket
- 14 illustrated card designs (CC BY 3.0 by Redbooth)
- Card presets: All Cards, Fibonacci, Simple, T-Shirt Sizes, Powers of 2
- Confidence score alongside votes (confident / guessing / no idea)
- Topic queue for prepared sessions
- Outlier detection with explanation prompts
- Fun reveal messages based on vote patterns
- Host controls: reveal, new round, kick, transfer host
- Keyboard navigation (arrow keys)
- No accounts, no tracking cookies, ephemeral sessions

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- Real-time: PartyKit (Cloudflare Workers)
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages
- Analytics: PostHog (anonymous, memory-only)
- Error tracking: Sentry
